case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. BREANA BALL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT BALL, BREANA DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PREJUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-28-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BALL, BREANA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BALL, BREANA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALL, BREANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 183 BROOKDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

ORDER GRANTING PLTF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF A FIRST AMENDED DEFAULT JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALL, BREANA DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 183 BLYTHDALE AVE. SAN FRANCISCO., LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
